scripts.dev: npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:backend
scripts.dev:ollama: npm run dev:frontend & AI_PROVIDER=ollama npm run dev:backend
scripts.dev:kimi: npm run dev:frontend & AI_PROVIDER=kimi npm run dev:backend
scripts.dev:deepseek: npm run dev:frontend & AI_PROVIDER=deepseek npm run dev:backend
scripts.dev:ocr: cd ocr-service && uv run uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001
scripts.dev:ocr:reload: cd ocr-service && uv run uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --reload
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
